pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh:27 - file is created at $PROJECT_DIR/app/main.py
Verified against setup_task.sh:37 - Python app creates file: os.path.join(LOG_DIR, 'startup_success.log')
Verified against setup_task.sh:34 - hardcoded as DB_HOST = 'db-primary.corp.local' in app/main.py
Verified against setup_task.sh:35 - hardcoded as AUTH_HOST = 'auth-gateway.partner.net' in app/main.py
Verified against setup_task.sh:63-65 - app checks 'if mode != PRODUCTION: sys.exit(1)'

privileged_info_summary: This is a Docker Compose infrastructure task where a legacy application ('FinCore') has hardcoded hostname requirements: db-primary.corp.local and auth-gateway.partner.net. The application requires environment variable MODE=PRODUCTION and expects a persistent log directory at /var/log/fincore/ mounted to ~/projects/fincore-migration/logs on the host. The task is synthetic - all files and services are created by the setup script. The application writes 'SYSTEM_READY' to startup_success.log upon successful initialization. All metadata values in task.json are accurate and correspond to the actual task implementation.
